modules.responsibility: Command, Group, Context, Parameter, Option, Argument, default/envvar/prompt/source resolution, and help formatting entry points.
ParamType conversion, composite types, ranges, files, paths, UUID, DateTime, and conversion error rendering.
CliRunner isolation, synthetic stdin/stdout/stderr streams, filesystem isolation, env overrides, and result capture.
Prompting, confirmation, progress bars, echo helpers, terminal input/output wrappers, and hidden input behavior.
Low-level option token parsing, long/short option matching, value arity, and parser state.
Decorator-facing construction of commands, options, arguments, context settings, and pass helpers.
HelpFormatter and wrapping behavior used by command help, option help, and terminal output.
Completion protocols, shell-specific completion output, and incomplete value handling.
